page.title: Template:Monarchs by nationality and century category header

revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:Monarchs by nationality and century category header]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 282 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))
